title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Mapei India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Mapei India
jsonLd.description:
We at Mapei India are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mapei India:
Mapei India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mapei India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
